SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.ui

Class RichTextEditorModel

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.ui.RichTextEditorModel
public class RichTextEditorModel extends Object
Toolkit-agnostic rich-text editor model.

Tracks document text, selection/caret and undo/redo history.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    RichTextEditorModel.CaretProperties
    Caret style snapshot resolved at current probe position.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RichTextEditorModel()
    Creates an empty editor model.
    RichTextEditorModel(RichText text, int maxHistorySize)
    Creates an editor model with initial text and history size.
    RichTextEditorModel(RichText text, int maxHistorySize, FontUtil fontUtil)
    Creates an editor model with initial text, history size and explicit font utility.
    RichTextEditorModel(@Nullable CharSequence text)
    Creates an editor model with initial text.
    RichTextEditorModel(@Nullable CharSequence text, FontUtil fontUtil)
    Creates an editor model with initial text and explicit font utility.

    • RichTextEditorModel

      public RichTextEditorModel()
      Creates an empty editor model.

    • RichTextEditorModel

      public RichTextEditorModel(@Nullable CharSequence text)
      Creates an editor model with initial text.
      Parameters:
      text - initial text

    • RichTextEditorModel

      public RichTextEditorModel(@Nullable CharSequence text, FontUtil fontUtil)
      Creates an editor model with initial text and explicit font utility.
      Parameters:
      text - initial text
      fontUtil - font utility used for layout-related calculations

    • RichTextEditorModel

      public RichTextEditorModel(RichText text, int maxHistorySize)
      Creates an editor model with initial text and history size.
      Parameters:
      text - initial text
      maxHistorySize - maximum number of history entries

    • RichTextEditorModel

      public RichTextEditorModel(RichText text, int maxHistorySize, FontUtil fontUtil)
      Creates an editor model with initial text, history size and explicit font utility.
      Parameters:
      text - initial text
      maxHistorySize - maximum number of history entries
      fontUtil - font utility used for layout-related calculations

      public boolean hasStyleAt(int position, Style style)
      Checks whether a style is active at a document position.
      Parameters:
      position - probe position
      style - style to test
      Returns:
      true if style is active

    • isSelectionStyled

      public boolean isSelectionStyled(Style style)
      Checks whether a style is active for the current selection.

      For a collapsed selection this checks the style at the caret probe index.

      Parameters:
      style - style to test
      Returns:
      true if the style is active everywhere in selection or at caret

      public void positionCaret(int position)
      Moves caret to a position and clears selection.
      Parameters:
      position - target caret position

      public boolean replaceText(int start, int end, @Nullable CharSequence replacement)
      Replaces text in a given range and records the change for undo/redo.
      Parameters:
      start - start offset (inclusive)
      end - end offset (exclusive)
      replacement - replacement text
      Returns:
      true if a change was applied

    • moveHorizontal

      public boolean moveHorizontal(int direction, boolean extendSelection, boolean wordNavigation)
      Moves caret horizontally by character or word.
      Parameters:
      direction - -1 for left, +1 for right
      extendSelection - true to keep anchor
      wordNavigation - true for word jumps
      Returns:
      true if selection/caret changed

    • moveLineBoundary

      public boolean moveLineBoundary(List<VisualLine> lines, boolean toEnd, boolean extendSelection)
      Moves caret to line start or end in current visual line.
      Parameters:
      lines - visual lines
      toEnd - true for end, false for start
      extendSelection - true to keep anchor
      Returns:
      true if selection/caret changed

    • moveLine

      public boolean moveLine(List<VisualLine> lines, int deltaLines, boolean extendSelection)
      Moves caret to a neighboring visual line while preserving x column.
      Parameters:
      lines - visual lines
      deltaLines - line delta
      extendSelection - true to keep anchor
      Returns:
      true if selection/caret changed

    • movePage

      public boolean movePage(List<VisualLine> lines, int deltaPages, boolean extendSelection)
      Moves caret by one page height in visual coordinates.
      Parameters:
      lines - visual lines
      deltaPages - page delta
      extendSelection - true to keep anchor
      Returns:
      true if selection/caret changed

    • buildVisualLines

      public List<VisualLine> buildVisualLines(double availableWidth, boolean wrapText, Font baseFont, Function<? super RichText,RichTextVisualLayoutHelper.BlockLayout> blockLayoutFactory)
      Builds or reuses cached visual lines for the current text.
      Parameters:
      availableWidth - layout width
      wrapText - whether wrapping is enabled
      baseFont - base font
      blockLayoutFactory - callback producing block layouts
      Returns:
      visual lines in source coordinates

    • buildVisualLines

      public List<VisualLine> buildVisualLines(boolean wrapText, Font baseFont, Function<? super RichText,RichTextVisualLayoutHelper.BlockLayout> blockLayoutFactory)
      Builds visual lines using wrap-width provider and resolved available width.
      Parameters:
      wrapText - whether wrapping is enabled
      baseFont - base font
      blockLayoutFactory - callback producing block layouts
      Returns:
      visual lines in source coordinates

    • applyAttributeToSelection

      public boolean applyAttributeToSelection(String attribute, @Nullable Object value)
      Sets/overrides one text attribute for current selection and stores history.
      Parameters:
      attribute - attribute name
      value - attribute value
      Returns:
      true if text changed

    • applyStyle

      public boolean applyStyle(Style style)
      Applies a style to current selection and stores history.
      Parameters:
      style - style to apply
      Returns:
      true if text changed

    • removeStyle

      public boolean removeStyle(Style style)
      Removes a style from current selection and stores history.
      Parameters:
      style - style to remove
      Returns:
      true if text changed

    • setStyle

      public boolean setStyle(Style style, boolean enabled)
      Sets style state in current selection.
      Parameters:
      style - style to set
      enabled - true to apply, false to remove
      Returns:
      true if text changed

    • markAttribute

      public boolean markAttribute(String attribute, Object enabledValue, Object disabledValue, boolean enabled)
      Sets an attribute state in current selection.
      Parameters:
      attribute - attribute name
      enabledValue - value for enabled state
      disabledValue - value for disabled state
      enabled - true for enabled state
      Returns:
      true if text changed

    • markBold

      public boolean markBold(boolean enabled)
      Sets bold state in current selection.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true for bold, false for normal
      Returns:
      true if text changed

      public boolean markItalic(boolean enabled)
      Sets italic state in current selection.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true for italic, false for normal
      Returns:
      true if text changed

    • markUnderline

      public boolean markUnderline(boolean enabled)
      Sets underline state in current selection.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true for underline, false for no underline
      Returns:
      true if text changed

      public boolean markStrikeThrough(boolean enabled)
      Sets strike-through state in current selection.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true for strike-through, false for none
      Returns:
      true if text changed

      Returns true if undo is possible.
      Returns:
      true if undo stack is non-empty

      Returns true if redo is possible.

      true if an undo step was applied

      probe index

      public int getPropertyProbeIndex(int textLength)

      Parameters:
      textLength - effective text length
      Returns:
      probe index

    • charAtDocument

      public char charAtDocument(int index)
      Returns document character at index.
      Parameters:
      index - index
      Returns:
      character or '\0' for empty document

    • resolveCaretProperties

      public @Nullable RichTextEditorModel.CaretProperties resolveCaretProperties(Font fallbackFont)
      Computes effective caret-format properties at current probe position.
      Parameters:
      fallbackFont - fallback font for missing attributes
      Returns:
      caret properties or null when document is empty

    • resolveAttribute

      public static @Nullable Object resolveAttribute(TextAttributes attributes, List<Style> styles, String name)
      Resolves one attribute from explicit attributes and style stack.
      Parameters:
      attributes - explicit attributes
      styles - style stack
      name - attribute name
      Returns:
      resolved value or null

    • resolveColor

      public static @Nullable Color resolveColor(TextAttributes attributes, List<Style> styles)
      Resolves text color from explicit attributes and style stack.
      Parameters:
      attributes - explicit attributes
      styles - style stack
      Returns:
      resolved color or null

    • resolveBackgroundColor

      public static @Nullable Color resolveBackgroundColor(TextAttributes attributes, List<Style> styles)
      Resolves background color from explicit attributes and style stack.
      Parameters:
      attributes - explicit attributes
      styles - style stack
      Returns:
      resolved color or null

    • resolveFontFamily

      public static @Nullable String resolveFontFamily(TextAttributes attributes, List<Style> styles)
      Resolves font family from explicit attributes and style stack.
      Parameters:
      attributes - explicit attributes
      styles - style stack
      Returns:
      resolved family or null

    • resolveFontSize

      public static double resolveFontSize(TextAttributes attributes, List<Style> styles)
      Resolves font size from explicit attributes and style stack.
      Parameters:
      attributes - explicit attributes
      styles - style stack
      Returns:
      resolved size or 0.0

    • toRichText

      public static RichText toRichText(@Nullable CharSequence text, Font font)
      Creates a rich-text value from plain text and a font style.
      Parameters:
      text - plain text
      font - font
      Returns:
      styled rich text

    • toRichText

      public static RichText toRichText(@Nullable CharSequence text, boolean bold, boolean italic, boolean underline, boolean strikeThrough, @Nullable Color color, @Nullable Color background, @Nullable String family, double size)
      Creates a rich-text value from plain text and current formatting flags.
      Parameters:
      text - text
      bold - bold flag
      italic - italic flag
      underline - underline flag
      strikeThrough - strike-through flag
      color - text color
      background - background color
      family - font family
      size - font size
      Returns:
      styled rich text
